innateAbility.name: Afterburner
innateAbility.description: Grants movement speed bonus for a short duration after Gyrocopter damages an enemy unit with his attacks or abilities.

abilities.name: Rocket Barrage
abilities.description: Launches a salvo of rockets at nearby enemy units in a radius around the Gyrocopter.

abilities.name: Homing Missile
abilities.description: Fires a homing missile to seek the unit-targeted enemy. Dealing damage and stunning when it reaches the target.Enemy units can destroy the missile before it reaches its target.

abilities.name: Flak Cannon
abilities.description: Gyrocopter now has a limited amount of attacks that hits all enemy units within the radius.Lasts until all the attacks are used or until the duration ends.

abilities.name: Side Gunner
abilities.description: The Side Gunner unit that attacks automatically, and prioritizes furthest enemy unit away within its attack radius.

abilities.name: Call Down
abilities.description: Call down a series of aerial missile strikes that slow and damage enemy units in a target area.
